title: Poêlon Le Creuset
description:
Beautiful Le Creuset fondue pot with a charming decorative pattern. Perfect for cozy dinners with family or friends, ideal for cheese, chocolate, or meat fondue.
Brand: Le Creuset
Made in France
Condition: Used, good condition
Height: 11.5 cm
Diameter: 16 cm
Elegant patterned design
High-quality, durable cookware
Le Creuset is known worldwide for its excellent craftsmanship and long-lasting quality. This fondue pot is both practical and decorative, perfect for fondue nights or as a lovely addition to your kitchen.
